profiles_select_for_public_review.name: profiles_select_for_public_review
profiles_select_for_public_review.using:
NOT "profiles"."forced_private_by_admin" AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM user_product_reviews r
        JOIN user_products up ON up.id = r.user_product_id
        WHERE r.is_public = TRUE
          AND r.moderation_status = 'visible'
          AND up.user_id = "profiles"."user_id"
      )

profiles_select_for_reaction.name: profiles_select_for_reaction

profiles_select_for_social_post.name: profiles_select_for_social_post
profiles_select_for_social_post.using:
NOT "profiles"."forced_private_by_admin" AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM social_posts sp
        WHERE sp.author_id = "profiles"."user_id" AND sp.moderation_status = 'visible'
      )

profiles_select_for_post_reply.name: profiles_select_for_post_reply
profiles_select_for_post_reply.using:
NOT "profiles"."forced_private_by_admin" AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM social_post_replies spr
        WHERE spr.author_id = "profiles"."user_id" AND spr.moderation_status = 'visible'
      )

user_dermo_profiles_select_public.name: user_dermo_profiles_select_public
user_dermo_profiles_select_public.using:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM profiles p
        WHERE p.user_id = "user_dermo_profiles"."user_id"
          AND p.profile_public = TRUE
          AND p.forced_private_by_admin = FALSE
      )

user_dermo_profiles_select_for_public_re.name: user_dermo_profiles_select_for_public_review
user_dermo_profiles_select_for_public_re.using:
("user_dermo_profiles"."skin_types_public" = TRUE OR "user_dermo_profiles"."fitzpatrick_public" = TRUE) AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM profiles p
        JOIN user_products up ON up.user_id = p.user_id
        JOIN user_product_reviews r ON r.user_product_id = up.id
        WHERE p.user_id = "user_dermo_profiles"."user_id"
          AND NOT p.forced_private_by_admin
          AND r.is_public = TRUE
          AND r.moderation_status = 'visible'
      )

user_dermo_profiles_select_discoverable.name: user_dermo_profiles_select_discoverable
user_dermo_profiles_select_discoverable.using:
"user_dermo_profiles"."discoverable" = TRUE AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM profiles p
        WHERE p.user_id = "user_dermo_profiles"."user_id"
          AND p.profile_public = TRUE
          AND p.forced_private_by_admin = FALSE
      )

ingredients_select_visible.name: ingredients_select_visible
ingredients_select_visible.using: moderation_status = 'visible' OR (SELECT auth.role()) IN ('admin', 'contributor') OR ("ingredients"."created_by" = (SELECT auth.uid()) AND current_setting('app.own_submissions', true) = 'on')

ingredients_insert_self.name: ingredients_insert_self
ingredients_insert_self.withCheck: (SELECT auth.role()) IN ('admin', 'contributor') OR ("ingredients"."created_by" = (SELECT auth.uid()) AND catalog_quality = 'unverified' AND moderation_status = 'visible')

ingredients_update_owner_or_role.name: ingredients_update_owner_or_role
ingredients_update_owner_or_role.using: (SELECT auth.role()) IN ('admin', 'contributor') OR ("ingredients"."created_by" = (SELECT auth.uid()) AND catalog_quality = 'unverified' AND moderation_status = 'visible')
ingredients_update_owner_or_role.withCheck: (SELECT auth.role()) IN ('admin', 'contributor') OR ("ingredients"."created_by" = (SELECT auth.uid()) AND catalog_quality = 'unverified' AND moderation_status = 'visible')

ingredients_type_category_check.name: ingredients_type_category_check
ingredients_type_category_check.value:
"ingredients"."category" IS NULL OR (
        ("ingredients"."type" = 'skincare'   AND "ingredients"."category" IN ('actif','humectant','emollient','filtre-uv','tensioactif','excipient')) OR
        ("ingredients"."type" = 'haircare'   AND "ingredients"."category" IN ('actif','conditionneur','filmogene','humectant','tensioactif','excipient')) OR
        ("ingredients"."type" = 'dental'     AND "ingredients"."category" IN ('actif','abrasif','aromatisant','humectant','tensioactif','excipient')) OR
        ("ingredients"."type" = 'supplement' AND "ingredients"."category" IN ('vitamine','mineral','acide-amine','acide-gras','antioxydant','carotenoide','plante','adaptogene','champignon','probiotique','prebiotique','peptide','collagene','polyphenol','neuroactif','longevite','enzyme','autre'))
      )

ingredients_verify_stamp_check.name: ingredients_verify_stamp_check
ingredients_verify_stamp_check.value: "ingredients"."catalog_quality" = 'verified' OR ("ingredients"."verified_by" IS NULL AND "ingredients"."verified_at" IS NULL)

product_comparison_items_tenant_isolatio.name: product_comparison_items_tenant_isolation
product_comparison_items_tenant_isolatio.using:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM "product_comparisons" c
        WHERE c.id = "product_comparison_items"."comparison_id"
          AND c.user_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
      )
product_comparison_items_tenant_isolatio.withCheck:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM "product_comparisons" c
        WHERE c.id = "product_comparison_items"."comparison_id"
          AND c.user_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
      )

discussion_threads_entity_xor.name: discussion_threads_entity_xor
discussion_threads_entity_xor.value: ("discussion_threads"."product_id" IS NOT NULL)::int + ("discussion_threads"."ingredient_id" IS NOT NULL)::int = 1

products_select_visible.name: products_select_visible
products_select_visible.using: moderation_status = 'visible' OR (SELECT auth.role()) IN ('admin', 'contributor') OR ("products"."created_by" = (SELECT auth.uid()) AND current_setting('app.own_submissions', true) = 'on')

products_insert_self.name: products_insert_self
products_insert_self.withCheck: (SELECT auth.role()) IN ('admin', 'contributor') OR ("products"."created_by" = (SELECT auth.uid()) AND catalog_quality = 'unverified' AND moderation_status = 'visible')

products_update_owner_or_role.name: products_update_owner_or_role
products_update_owner_or_role.using: (SELECT auth.role()) IN ('admin', 'contributor') OR ("products"."created_by" = (SELECT auth.uid()) AND catalog_quality = 'unverified' AND moderation_status = 'visible')
products_update_owner_or_role.withCheck: (SELECT auth.role()) IN ('admin', 'contributor') OR ("products"."created_by" = (SELECT auth.uid()) AND catalog_quality = 'unverified' AND moderation_status = 'visible')

products_kind_category_check.name: products_kind_category_check
products_kind_category_check.value:
(
        ("products"."category" = 'skincare'   AND "products"."kind" IN ('serum','moisturizer','cleanser','toner','exfoliant','eye-cream','mask','mist','essence','spot-treatment','lip-care','balm','oil','primer','patch')) OR
        ("products"."category" = 'solaire'    AND "products"."kind" IN ('sunscreen','after-sun','self-tanner')) OR
        ("products"."category" = 'complement' AND "products"."kind" IN ('gelule','capsule','ampoule','poudre','sirop','gummy','huile')) OR
        ("products"."category" = 'haircare'   AND "products"."kind" IN ('shampoo','conditioner','hair-mask','hair-serum','hair-oil','styling','hair-color')) OR
        ("products"."category" = 'bodycare'   AND "products"."kind" IN ('body-lotion','body-oil','body-scrub','body-wash','deodorant','hand-cream','foot-cream')) OR
        ("products"."category" = 'dental'     AND "products"."kind" IN ('toothpaste','mouthwash','teeth-whitening','floss'))
      )

products_verify_stamp_check.name: products_verify_stamp_check
products_verify_stamp_check.value: "products"."catalog_quality" = 'verified' OR ("products"."verified_by" IS NULL AND "products"."verified_at" IS NULL)

        WHERE p.id = "purchases"."user_product_id"

social_posts_anchor_min1.name: social_posts_anchor_min1
social_posts_anchor_min1.value: ("social_posts"."product_id" IS NOT NULL)::int + ("social_posts"."ingredient_id" IS NOT NULL)::int + ("social_posts"."concern_slug" IS NOT NULL)::int >= 1
